CustomMetadata.label: MS-001 - Hardcoded secrets in Custom Met

values.value: Hardcoded secrets in Custom Metadata records
Custom Metadata Type records have field API names matching *Token*, *Key*, *Secret*, *Password*, or *Credential* patterns with non-empty values. Secrets are embedded directly in deployable metadata.
API tokens, encryption keys, or passwords stored in CMT records are included in full org exports and package deploys. Any admin with Customize Application permission can read these values in Setup.

Remove all credential values from CMT records. Use Named Credentials (OAuth2) or an external secrets manager. CMT fields should hold non-sensitive references (e.g. named credential names) not actual secret values.
